steps: Scrape cells and transfer the suspension to a 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube.
Centrifuge at 10,000 x g for 5 minutes at 4°C and collect the supernatant in a new microcentrifuge tube.
Determine protein concentration by using DC ™ Protein Assay Kit.
Load 35 µg of total protein on a SDS-PAGE gel.
Run the gel for 1 h at 100 V.
Transfer proteins onto a PVDF membrane using Trans-Blot Turbo™ Transfer System.
Wash the cells with ice-cold PBS and add ice-cold RIPA buffer with cOmplete™ Protease Inhibitor Cocktail.
Incubate the lysate on ice for 15 minutes.
Place the blot in Blocking One and incubate with agitation for 20 minutes.
Incubate the blot with appropriate dilutions of primary antibody at 4°C overnight.
Place the blot in TBST and wash three times, 5 minutes each.
Incubate the blot with the species-matched horseradish peroxidase-conjugated secondary antibody for 1 hour.
Place the blot in TBST and wash three times, 5 minutes each.
Add Chemi-Lumi One Super to cover the blot and incubate for 1 minute.
Detect chemiluminescence using LAS-4000mini image analyzer.
creator: Yoshiyuki Matsuo
